raw_consumer_statement:
A total of XXXX transactions were approved by CITI Bank on a CITI issued card between September 8-10 2024. All XXXX were reported as fraud and XXXX had already been refunded by the merchant as suspicious. I saw a credit on the account the morning of the XXXX of XXXX when I called in to report them all as fraud. I have a police report from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) as well. 

CITI is claiming that no refunds have been issued, will not issue provisional credit for the frauds, and claiming I am over my limit. I have proof in hand that on the XXXX at least XXXX of the XXXX charges ( not including the one I saw on the account ) has been refunded. I have been told by both the vendor that refunded right away ( that I saw on the statement ) and the second vendor that refunds have all been fully processed and settled. CITI refuses to get me a manager or supervisor as they are all " too busy '' and refuses to settle the dispute or explain where any of the refunds have gone. 

At this point, I was the victim of Credit Card Theft, and apparently also a victim of the CC company refusing to process the refunds already issued. This is negatively impact my personal credit.
